programs.title: Butchers of L.A.
programs.desc: With Bonin behind bars, law enforcement hopes the nightmare is over, until another wave of freeway murders shatters their illusion; this third killer is the most methodical of them all and, if not for a random police check, might have evaded police.

programs.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programs.desc: In November 1959, four members of the Clutter family are brutally murdered in their home in a small Kansas farming community.

programs.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programs.desc: Kansas law enforcement survey the aftermath of the seemingly unmotivated crime, while criminals Perry Smith and Richard Hickock go on the lam.

programs.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programs.desc: Detailing the resulting investigation and convictions of Perry Smith and Richard Hickock, along with the ensuing media coverage.

programs.title: Cold Blooded: The Clutter Family Murders
programs.desc: As Perry Smith and Richard Hickock face a death sentence, Truman Capote's coverage of the infamous case and his ensuing novel, "In Cold Blood," spawns the modern American True Crime genre.
